svg.text: Mini Project 2 · React product-discovery SPA · React Router · MUI · Fake Store API · by Joshua Ojeda

g.text: live API data · shared via Context · Material UI
search · category filter · sort · save (page state via useState; data via useProducts)
Showing 12 of 20 products [chips: Search · Category · Sort]
saved products via global Context (no prop-drilling) + localStorage persistence
Empty state: "No saved products yet" + Browse products CTA
explains the project for the 5–10 minute presentation
Hooks: useState · useEffect · useContext · useMemo · useParams · useSearchParams
Custom hook: useProducts() → Axios fetch of fakestoreapi.com/products
Tools: React 19 · Vite · React Router · Material UI · Axios
